expansion:
Please request the appropriate approval from your leadership in order to proceed.

Approval thresholds:
• Dollar amount greater than $500 = Manager approval required
• Dollar amount greater than $10,000 = Director approval required
• Dollar amount greater than $50,000 = VP approval required

Please respond with approval or questions within 7 days of this request.
Per procurement policy, any work performed by a preferred vendor exceeding $10,000 requires at least 2 competing quotes. Please obtain and/or attach a competing quote for this work.

Per procurement policy, any work by a non-preferred vendor requires at least 2 competing quotes and additional business justification. Please obtain and/or attach a competing quote and justification for this work.

Request has been processed and submitted for Purchase Order. Typical approval time is 3-5 business days.

IMPORTANT: Vendors are not authorized to conduct any services until there is an approved Purchase Order.

Submitted PR for PO creation: [PR NUMBER]

PO will be issued via automated email to the vendor upon approval.

Notes:
- You are responsible for receiving any parts ordered upon delivery
- PM will follow up on any invoice holds for items not received

Per procurement policy, expenditures over $10,000 require at least 2 competing quotes before approval. Please provide:

1. Quote from current/preferred vendor
2. Quote from at least one alternative vendor

Once both quotes are received, we can proceed with approval.
